name: Casera Sauce (Salsa Casera)
recipeIngredient: 1 each Canned jalapeno pepper, seed removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop all ingredients.
2. Mix the chopped ingredients in a bowl.
3. Cover and refrigerate in a glass or plastic container.
4. Do not refrigerate for longer than 7 days.
5. Yield: about 2 cups of sauce.
6. Note: A bottled tomato and yellow chili sauce can be substituted in recipes calling for Casera Sauce.
